journal_entry.description: Receipt of security deposit for building lease
journal_entry.rationale: Cash received increases asset. Security deposit creates a liability to the tenant (refundable at lease end, subject to any damages). No revenue is recognized at this time because the deposit is refundable and not earned. The monthly rent will be recognized as revenue when earned each month.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Security deposit received in cash increases Cash (asset) and creates a liability (Security Deposits Payable) because it is refundable to the tenant at lease end. No revenue is recognized at signing; rental revenue will be recognized monthly as earned. No HST applies to security deposits as they are not consideration for a taxable supply.
